description: CompositionGreen printed kurta made of 100% cotton fabric, has 3/4 sleeves, a split neckline, pleats on the front and a vented hemFitRegularWash careDry clean onlyThis kurta by w is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic top and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look.Model statisticsThe product is a size WVG on a model of height 5’8” and chest 33”
